title: Keepsake Boxes, Tooth, Curl, Blank, 3 Boxes, Silver and White, Baby's First Memories
features: Keepsake Boxes: Three adorable boxes for preserving precious baby memories - a tooth box, a curl box, and a Precious things memory box
Elegant Design: Crafted with a silver and white pearlescent colour scheme, these boxes exude a timeless charm, perfect for gifting.
Versatile Usage: While designed for baby milestones, these boxes can also be used to store small trinkets or mementos.
Thoughtful Gift: An ideal present for new parents, baby showers, or to commemorate a child's special moments.
description: Cherish life's precious moments with these exquisite keepsake boxes. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these silver and white Pearlescent boxes are the perfect to store your baby's first tooth, a delicate curl, or any other treasured memenity. Elegantly designed, these boxes make for delightful gifts. With three boxes included in the set, you can keep multiple keepsakes organised and beautifully displayed. Measuring 5.5cm x 5.5 cm x 4.5 cm, these boxes strike the perfect balance between compact and spacious. Crafted from high-quality materials, these keepsake boxes are built to last, ensuring your cherished memories remain safe and secure for years to come. Whether you're a new parent or simply someone who appreciates the finer things in life, these keepsake boxes are a must-have addition to your collection.
